") center/500% 100% no-repeat;filter:sepia(.1) brightness(1.05) drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(225,177,86,.2))}.palazzo-reveal small{display:block;color:#8e826d;font-size:6px;letter-spacing:.19em}.palazzo-reveal strong{display:block;margin-top:5px;color:#d8bd87;font:400 17px var(--serif)}
    .dial-center strong,.time-stat strong{font-weight:200!important;font-variation-settings:"wght" 260;letter-spacing:-.075em!important}.time-page .time-layout{gap:clamp(34px,5vw,80px)!important}.time-page .time-dial{max-width:560px!important}.time-page .time-journal{background:linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(10,9,8,.18),rgba(255,255,255,.02))!important;border:1px solid rgba(214,180,112,.13)!important}

    @media(max-width:1100px){body[data-view="album"] .album-head{grid-template-columns:1fr}.album-collection-bar{grid-template-columns:44px repeat(3,auto) 1fr auto}.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(14,minmax(0,1fr))!important}.scene-header{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}.scene-header-tools{justify-self:start!important;width:min(520px,100%)!important;grid-template-columns:1fr 116px!important}.scene-visual-panel{left:0!important;right:auto!important}.window-row{overflow-x:auto!important;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,170px)!important}}
    @media(max-width:720px){body[data-view="album"] .album-page{padding:13px 11px 60px}.album-collection-bar{grid-template-columns:38px 1fr auto}.album-tab:not(.active){display:none}.album-exit{grid-column:3;padding:0 4px}.album-exit span{display:none}body[data-view="album"] .album-head{padding:0 10px;margin-top:24px}.album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(8,minmax(0,1fr))!important;padding-inline:18px!important}.scene-header-tools{width:100%!important}.world-clocks{min-height:72px!important}.scene-visual-panel{width:min(92vw,520px)!important;grid-template-columns:43px 1fr!important}.scene-visual-panel label,.scene-visual-panel .custom-wallpaper{grid-column:1/3!important}.scene-gallery{height:700px!important}.scene-card:nth-child(1),.scene-card:nth-child(7){--w:132px}.scene-card:nth-child(2),.scene-card:nth-child(6){--w:112px}.scene-card:nth-child(3),.scene-card:nth-child(5){--w:125px}.pocket-watch.watch-orbit{width:120px;height:120px}.window-rewards{padding-inline:14px!important}}

    /* V11 · exact visual-contract correction */
    @media(min-width:1101px){
      /* Keep the three Italian water rings and the five architectural rewards in one composed view. */
      .time-page{padding:34px clamp(38px,4.2vw,68px) 38px!important}
      .time-page>.micro{position:relative;z-index:2}.time-page>.page-title{position:relative;z-index:2;margin:8px 0 0!important;font-size:clamp(45px,4.1vw,64px)!important;font-weight:300!important;letter-spacing:-.045em!important}
      .time-page .time-layout{grid-template-columns:minmax(360px,.86fr) minmax(470px,1.14fr)!important;gap:clamp(35px,5vw,78px)!important;min-height:350px!important;margin-top:-8px!important}
      .time-page .time-dial{width:min(385px,88%)!important;max-width:385px!important}
      .time-page .dial-center strong{font-size:clamp(49px,4.8vw,70px)!important}
      .time-page .time-journal{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1.25fr 1fr!important;column-gap:30px!important;align-content:center!important;padding:18px 0 18px 38px!important}
      .time-page .time-quote{grid-column:1/3!important;margin:0 0 10px!important;font-size:clamp(22px,2.05vw,31px)!important}
      .time-page .time-stat{padding:12px 0!important}.time-page .time-stat:nth-of-type(1){grid-column:1}.time-page .time-stat:nth-of-type(2){grid-column:2}.time-page .time-stat:nth-of-type(3){grid-column:1/3}
      .time-page .time-stat strong{font-size:clamp(27px,2.4vw,38px)!important;font-weight:200!important}
      .time-page .time-reward{grid-column:1/3!important;margin-top:9px!important;padding:11px 15px!important}
      .time-page .window-rewards{margin-top:3px!important;padding:14px 25px 13px!important}
      .time-page .window-rewards header{padding-bottom:7px!important}.time-page .window-row{margin-top:9px!important;gap:20px!important;align-items:start!important}
      .time-page .study-window{min-height:210px!important;padding-bottom:25px!important;opacity:.58!important;filter:saturate(.62) brightness(.72)}
      .time-page .study-window.unlocked{opacity:1!important;filter:saturate(.95) brightness(1)}
      .time-page .study-window .window-light{width:84px!important;height:158px!important;margin:0 auto!important;background-size:500% 100%!important}
      .time-page .study-window>small{bottom:0!important}.time-page .study-window>b{font-size:13px!important}.time-page .study-window>em{font-size:5.5px!important}
    }

    /* 7C is a single luminous journey, not two closed eye-shaped loops. */
    @media(min-width:1101px){
      .scene-header{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 480px!important;gap:54px!important}
      .scene-header-tools{grid-template-columns:334px 132px!important;grid-template-rows:82px!important;width:480px!important;gap:14px!important}
      .world-clocks{grid-column:1!important;grid-row:1!important;min-height:82px!important}
      .scene-visual-button{grid-column:2!important;grid-row:1!important;width:132px!important;height:82px!important;border-radius:28px!important;flex-direction:column!important;gap:12px!important}
      .scene-visual-panel{top:96px!important;width:620px!important}
    }
    .scene-gallery{background:radial-gradient(circle at 49% 52%,rgba(211,177,108,.035),transparent 24%),linear-gradient(145deg,rgba(5,5,4,.035),rgba(28,23,18,.045))!important}
    .scene-curve{opacity:.82!important}.scene-curve path:first-child{stroke:rgba(236,214,172,.085)!important;stroke-width:7!important;filter:blur(2.4px)!important}.scene-curve path:last-child{stroke-width:1.05!important;stroke-dasharray:none!important;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(228,197,136,.33))!important;animation:sceneSilkThread 7s ease-in-out infinite!important}
    @keyframes sceneSilkThread{50%{opacity:.58;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 13px rgba(228,197,136,.48))}}
    .scene-card{opacity:.5!important;filter:saturate(.72) brightness(.76)!important}
    .scene-card:hover{opacity:.78!important;filter:saturate(.88) brightness(.92)!important}
    .scene-card:nth-child(1){--w:190px;--ih:156px;--rot:-3deg;left:2.5%!important;top:43%!important}
    .scene-card:nth-child(2){--w:158px;--ih:119px;--rot:2.5deg;left:15%!important;top:10%!important}
    .scene-card:nth-child(3){--w:184px;--ih:148px;--rot:-1.8deg;left:29%!important;bottom:4%!important}
    .scene-card:nth-child(4){--w:158px;--ih:117px;--rot:2deg;left:49%!important;top:7%!important}
    .scene-card:nth-child(5){--w:184px;--ih:148px;--rot:2.2deg;right:27%!important;bottom:5%!important}
    .scene-card:nth-child(6){--w:158px;--ih:119px;--rot:-2.5deg;right:13%!important;top:12%!important}
    .scene-card:nth-child(7){--w:190px;--ih:156px;--rot:3deg;right:2%!important;top:38%!important}
    .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{width:142px!important;height:142px!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 24px rgba(219,181,108,.018),0 0 0 58px rgba(219,181,108,.008)!important}

    /* A scrollable spatial archive: foreground tissue, mid-ground stamps and distant mist. */
    .album-wall{grid-template-columns:repeat(20,minmax(0,1fr))!important;grid-template-rows:repeat(150,28px)!important;grid-auto-rows:28px!important;grid-auto-flow:initial!important;min-height:4300px!important;padding:72px 5vw 160px!important;perspective:1050px!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot{grid-column:var(--col,1) / span var(--cs,3)!important;grid-row:var(--row,1) / span var(--rs,5)!important;transform:translate3d(var(--dx,0),var(--dy,0),var(--z,0px)) rotate(var(--rot,0deg)) scale(var(--depth-scale,1))!important;filter:blur(var(--depth-blur,0px));animation:none!important;content-visibility:auto;contain-intrinsic-size:160px 190px;will-change:transform,filter}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+1),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+2),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+3){animation:archiveDrift calc(8s + var(--float,0s)) ease-in-out infinite alternate!important;animation-delay:calc(var(--delay,0s) * -1)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:has(.stamp-card:not(.locked)){z-index:12!important;filter:none;--depth-scale:1.08}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:before{inset:-34% -48%!important;opacity:.58!important;clip-path:polygon(7% 11%,25% 3%,52% 8%,77% 1%,96% 14%,91% 42%,100% 69%,84% 94%,52% 88%,26% 99%,3% 83%,10% 53%,0 29%)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(even):before{clip-path:polygon(2% 18%,26% 2%,56% 9%,87% 4%,98% 30%,90% 58%,100% 84%,72% 97%,43% 88%,15% 99%,4% 72%,11% 44%)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(5n):before{clip-path:polygon(12% 2%,42% 9%,67% 1%,96% 18%,88% 46%,100% 76%,77% 96%,49% 87%,19% 99%,1% 73%,9% 38%)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card{width:78%!important;height:78%!important;max-width:158px!important;max-height:196px!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp{z-index:18!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp .stamp-card{width:90%!important;height:88%!important;max-width:242px!important;max-height:302px!important;box-shadow:0 32px 58px rgba(0,0,0,.4)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp:before{inset:-31% -42%!important;opacity:.73!important;filter:sepia(.22) brightness(.82) drop-shadow(0 30px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.42))!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp:after{content:attr(data-callout);position:absolute;z-index:20;left:93%;top:54%;width:150px;padding-left:58px;color:#d9bf8c;font:500 6px var(--sans);letter-spacing:.18em;white-space:nowrap;background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(218,184,118,.72),rgba(218,184,118,0)) left 8px/52px 1px no-repeat;opacity:.72}
    .album-wall .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.34!important;filter:grayscale(.82) blur(1.45px) sepia(.62) brightness(.8)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:has(.stamp-card.locked):before{opacity:.47!important;filter:sepia(.32) brightness(.68) blur(.35px) drop-shadow(0 20px 27px rgba(0,0,0,.34))!important}
    .album-wall.style-fog .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.24!important}.album-wall.style-fog .stamp-slot:before{opacity:.26!important}
    .album-wall.style-darkroom .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.4!important}.album-wall.style-darkroom .stamp-slot:before{opacity:.38!important}
    .album-wall.style-tissue .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.37!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-slot{filter:none!important;opacity:1!important}.album-wall.demo .stamp-card{opacity:1!important}

    /* V12 · final visual parity: visible tricolore water rings and a legible archive focal plane. */
    .time-page .dial-track{stroke-width:1.05!important;stroke-linecap:round;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(255,255,255,.08))}
    .time-page .dial-track:nth-of-type(1){stroke:url(#todayWave)!important;opacity:.42;animation:ringBaseGreen 7s ease-in-out infinite}
    .time-page .dial-track:nth-of-type(2){stroke:url(#sessionWave)!important;opacity:.35;animation:ringBaseIvory 9.5s ease-in-out infinite}
    .time-page .dial-track:nth-of-type(3){stroke:url(#rewardWave)!important;opacity:.38;animation:ringBaseRed 12s ease-in-out infinite}
    .time-page .dial-arc{filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px currentColor)!important}
    .time-page .dial-arc.today{stroke-width:1.55!important}.time-page .dial-arc.session{stroke-width:1.25!important}.time-page .dial-arc.reward{stroke-width:1.05!important}
    @keyframes ringBaseGreen{0%,100%{opacity:.23;transform:scale(.994)}48%{opacity:.5;transform:scale(1.006)}72%{opacity:.35;transform:scale(1)}}
    @keyframes ringBaseIvory{0%,100%{opacity:.2;transform:scale(1.006)}44%{opacity:.43;transform:scale(.992)}76%{opacity:.28;transform:scale(1)}}
    @keyframes ringBaseRed{0%,100%{opacity:.21;transform:scale(.99)}53%{opacity:.46;transform:scale(1.009)}81%{opacity:.3;transform:scale(1.002)}}
    .time-page .time-dial svg{overflow:visible}.time-page .dial-center{padding:28px;border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(12,11,9,.14),transparent 68%)}

    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp .stamp-card.locked{opacity:.56!important;filter:grayscale(.7) blur(.7px) sepia(.6) brightness(.86)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp:has(.stamp-card.locked):before{opacity:.76!important;filter:sepia(.2) brightness(.78) blur(.12px) drop-shadow(0 32px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.46))!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp{filter:none!important;--depth-scale:1.34!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp .stamp-card{max-width:270px!important;max-height:330px!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+4),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+6),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+9){opacity:.5}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+5),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+10){opacity:.68}
    .album-wall.style-tissue .stamp-slot.focal-stamp:before{background-size:112% 108%;mix-blend-mode:screen}
    .album-wall.style-tissue .stamp-slot:not(.focal-stamp):before{mix-blend-mode:screen}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp:after{left:100%!important;top:56%!important;opacity:.86!important}

    @media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){
      *,*:before,*:after{animation-duration:.001ms!important;animation-iteration-count:1!important;transition-duration:.001ms!important}
    }
    /* V12 · fidelity repair against the approved 7C / Palazzo / archive-wall boards */
    /* 7C: a light constellation of scenes. No filled lobes, no black "eye" mass. */
    .scenes-page .scene-gallery{
      height:min(64vh,620px)!important;min-height:570px!important;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(18,15,12,.085),rgba(255,255,255,.018))!important;
      border-color:rgba(225,196,139,.18)!important;isolation:isolate
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-gallery:before,.scenes-page .scene-gallery:after{display:none!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-curve{z-index:1!important;opacity:.74!important;pointer-events:none}
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path{fill:none!important;stroke-linecap:round!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path:first-child{stroke:rgba(238,216,174,.12)!important;stroke-width:1.2!important;filter:blur(.25px)!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path:last-child{stroke:url(#sceneLine)!important;stroke-width:1.15!important;stroke-dasharray:1 13!important;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(228,197,136,.38))!important;animation:sceneSilkThread 7s ease-in-out infinite!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-track{z-index:3!important}
    .scenes-page .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{z-index:7!important;width:132px!important;height:132px!important;background:transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card{opacity:.4!important;background:linear-gradient(155deg,rgba(18,15,12,.28),rgba(255,255,255,.025))!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card.on{opacity:1!important;filter:none!important;transform:rotate(0) scale(1.16)!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(4).on{transform:translateX(-50%) rotate(0) scale(1.16)!important}
    @media(min-width:1101px){
      .scenes-page .scene-header{grid-template-columns:minmax(0,1fr) 440px!important;gap:44px!important}
      .scenes-page .scene-header-tools{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:286px 140px!important;grid-template-rows:76px!important;width:440px!important;gap:14px!important}
      .scenes-page .world-clocks{grid-column:1!important;min-height:76px!important;border-radius:25px!important}
      .scenes-page .scene-visual-button{grid-column:2!important;width:140px!important;height:76px!important;border-radius:25px!important;flex-direction:column!important;justify-content:center!important;gap:9px!important}
      .scenes-page .scene-visual-panel{top:90px!important;right:0!important;width:590px!important}
    }

    /* Palazzo del tempo: five genuinely different Italian architectural windows. */
    .time-page .window-rewards{background:linear-gradient(140deg,rgba(14,11,8,.3),rgba(61,45,27,.08))!important}
    .time-page .window-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(5,minmax(145px,1fr))!important;gap:clamp(12px,1.8vw,28px)!important}
    .time-page .study-window{min-height:245px!important;padding-inline:4px!important}
    .time-page .study-window .window-light{width:min(150px,100%)!important;height:172px!important;background-size:500% 100%!important;filter:sepia(.32) saturate(.62) brightness(.5) drop-shadow(0 13px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.34))!important}
    .time-page .study-window.unlocked .window-light{filter:sepia(.08) saturate(.92) brightness(1.08) drop-shadow(0 0 22px rgba(238,183,87,.28))!important}
    .time-page .study-window .window-light:after{inset:25% 24% 18%!important;background:radial-gradient(ellipse,rgba(255,212,129,.78),rgba(224,143,62,.28) 48%,transparent 74%)!important}
    .time-page .study-window .window-kicker{font-size:7px!important}.time-page .study-window>b{font-size:16px!important;font-weight:300!important}.time-page .study-window>em{font-size:6px!important}

    /* Album: each ten-stamp chapter is a full spatial room, not a collapsing grid column. */
    body[data-view="album"] .album-page{background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(8,7,6,.58),rgba(30,24,18,.18) 48%,rgba(8,7,6,.58))!important}
    .album-wall{
      position:relative!important;display:block!important;width:100%!important;
      min-height:5900px!important;height:5900px!important;max-height:none!important;
      padding:0!important;margin:20px 0 0!important;overflow:visible!important;
      perspective:1350px!important;transform-style:preserve-3d!important;
      background:linear-gradient(rgba(10,8,6,.35),rgba(10,8,6,.54)),var(--scene-image)!important;
      background-size:cover!important;background-position:center top!important;background-attachment:fixed!important
    }
    .album-wall:before{position:absolute!important;inset:0!important;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 6%,rgba(229,195,126,.12),transparent 19%),linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(4,4,3,.3),transparent 48%,rgba(4,4,3,.34))!important;opacity:1!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot{
      position:absolute!important;left:var(--wall-x)!important;top:var(--wall-y)!important;
      width:var(--wall-w)!important;height:var(--wall-h)!important;
      display:grid!important;place-items:center!important;grid-column:auto!important;grid-row:auto!important;
      transform:translate3d(-50%,-50%,var(--z,0px)) rotate(var(--rot,0deg)) scale(var(--depth-scale,1))!important;
      filter:blur(var(--depth-blur,0px));animation:archiveDrift calc(8s + var(--float,0s)) ease-in-out infinite alternate!important;
      isolation:isolate;overflow:visible!important;contain:none!important;content-visibility:visible!important
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:before{inset:-30% -38%!important;opacity:.5!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card{width:68%!important;height:70%!important;max-width:none!important;max-height:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp{z-index:18!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp .stamp-card{width:78%!important;height:80%!important;max-width:none!important;max-height:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp:after{left:88%!important;top:54%!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+4),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+6),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+9){opacity:.5}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+5),.album-wall .stamp-slot:nth-child(10n+10){opacity:.7}
    @media(max-width:900px){.album-wall{height:7200px!important;min-height:7200px!important}.album-wall .stamp-slot{width:var(--wall-w-mobile)!important;height:var(--wall-h-mobile)!important}.album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp:after{display:none}}

    /* V13 · approved archive wall + luminous scene journey
       This is the single final contract for the two pages below. */

    /* ARCHIVE — a spatial wall of real stamp silhouettes, without tissue props. */
    body[data-view="album"] .album-page{
      min-height:100vh!important;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(7,7,6,.68),rgba(24,20,16,.18) 48%,rgba(7,7,6,.66))!important;
      backdrop-filter:blur(2px) saturate(.78)!important;
    }
    body[data-view="album"] .album-head{
      grid-template-columns:minmax(500px,1.02fr) minmax(540px,.98fr)!important;
      align-items:end!important;gap:22px!important;margin:24px 0 0!important;padding:0 24px!important;
    }
    body[data-view="album"] .album-head .page-title{
      font-size:clamp(42px,3.75vw,58px)!important;line-height:.94!important;white-space:nowrap!important;
    }
    body[data-view="album"] .album-head .page-copy{margin-top:16px!important;max-width:590px!important}
    body[data-view="album"] .album-tools{align-self:end!important;padding-bottom:2px!important}
    .album-wall{
      --wall-height:5820px;
      position:relative!important;display:block!important;width:100%!important;
      height:var(--wall-height)!important;min-height:var(--wall-height)!important;max-height:none!important;
      margin:16px 0 0!important;padding:0!important;overflow:visible!important;
      border:1px solid rgba(218,184,116,.16)!important;border-radius:3px!important;
      perspective:none!important;perspective-origin:50% 240px!important;transform-style:preserve-3d!important;isolation:isolate!important;
      background:
        linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(9,8,7,.42),rgba(9,8,7,.66)),
        var(--scene-image)!important;
      background-size:cover!important;background-position:center top!important;background-attachment:fixed!important;
      mask-image:none!important;
    }
    .album-wall:before{
      content:""!important;position:absolute!important;z-index:0!important;inset:0!important;
      background:
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 5%,rgba(231,201,143,.14),transparent 16%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 18% 12%,rgba(237,221,191,.055),transparent 12%),
        radial-gradient(ellipse at 82% 18%,rgba(237,221,191,.045),transparent 14%),
        linear-gradient(90deg,rgba(3,3,3,.34),transparent 43%,rgba(3,3,3,.38))!important;
      opacity:1!important;filter:none!important;pointer-events:none!important;
    }
    .album-wall:after{
      content:"SCORRI · SCROLL"!important;position:absolute!important;z-index:30!important;
      top:92px!important;right:16px!important;bottom:92px!important;width:1px!important;
      padding-top:16px!important;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(221,186,116,.7),transparent)!important;
      color:#cdb17b!important;font:500 6px var(--sans)!important;letter-spacing:.22em!important;
      writing-mode:vertical-rl!important;text-orientation:mixed!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-slot{
      position:absolute!important;left:var(--wall-x)!important;top:var(--wall-y)!important;
      width:var(--wall-w)!important;height:var(--wall-h)!important;display:grid!important;place-items:center!important;
      grid-column:auto!important;grid-row:auto!important;overflow:visible!important;contain:none!important;
      content-visibility:visible!important;isolation:isolate!important;transform-style:preserve-3d!important;
      transform:translate3d(-50%,-50%,var(--z,0px)) rotate(var(--rot,0deg)) scale(var(--depth-scale,1))!important;
      filter:blur(var(--depth-blur,0px)) drop-shadow(0 18px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.24))!important;
      opacity:var(--depth-opacity,.78)!important;
      animation:archiveFloat calc(7.5s + var(--float,0s)) ease-in-out infinite alternate!important;
      animation-delay:calc(var(--delay,0s) * -1)!important;
      transition:filter .8s,opacity .8s,z-index 0s!important;
    }
    @keyframes archiveFloat{
      0%{translate:-3px -5px}
      52%{translate:2px 3px}
      100%{translate:4px 7px}
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:before,
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:after{content:none!important;display:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card{
      position:relative!important;z-index:2!important;width:100%!important;height:100%!important;
      min-width:0!important;min-height:0!important;max-width:none!important;max-height:none!important;
      padding:4px!important;border:0!important;background:rgba(224,211,186,.92)!important;
      box-shadow:0 23px 48px rgba(0,0,0,.44),0 0 0 1px rgba(240,223,188,.12)!important;
      filter:sepia(.12) saturate(.78)!important;opacity:1!important;overflow:hidden!important;
      transition:transform .72s var(--ease),filter .72s,opacity .72s,box-shadow .72s!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-card img{
      width:100%!important;height:100%!important;display:block!important;object-fit:cover!important;
      filter:grayscale(0) sepia(.04) saturate(.88) brightness(.92)!important;opacity:1!important;
      transition:filter .9s,opacity .9s!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-caption{display:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card.locked{
      opacity:.88!important;background:rgba(210,202,184,.38)!important;
      filter:grayscale(1) sepia(.2) brightness(.78) contrast(.94)!important;
      box-shadow:0 20px 42px rgba(0,0,0,.38),inset 0 0 24px rgba(233,220,195,.12)!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-card.locked img{
      filter:grayscale(1) sepia(.18) blur(.5px) brightness(.78) contrast(.92)!important;
      opacity:.82!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-card.locked:after{
      content:""!important;display:block!important;position:absolute!important;inset:0!important;
      background:linear-gradient(115deg,rgba(229,218,197,.12),rgba(13,12,10,.2))!important;
      pointer-events:none!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-slot:hover{z-index:40!important;filter:none!important;opacity:1!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card:not(.locked):hover{
      transform:translateZ(90px) scale(1.14) rotate(0)!important;
      filter:sepia(0) saturate(1) brightness(1.02)!important;
      box-shadow:0 34px 72px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 0 28px rgba(225,190,122,.14)!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp{z-index:15!important;filter:none!important;opacity:1!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot.focal-stamp .stamp-card{width:100%!important;height:100%!important;max-width:none!important;max-height:none!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-slot{filter:none!important;opacity:1!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-card.locked{filter:none!important;opacity:1!important}
    .album-wall.demo .stamp-card.locked img{filter:sepia(.06) saturate(.92) brightness(.96)!important;opacity:1!important}

    /* The Camera Oscura unlock: monochrome becomes colour under a warm scan of light. */
    .album-wall .stamp-card.color-reveal img,
    #stampPreview .preview-card.stamp-awakening #previewStampImage{
      animation:none!important;
      filter:grayscale(1) sepia(.2) saturate(.45) brightness(.58) contrast(.9)!important;
      opacity:.72!important;
      transition:filter .42s cubic-bezier(.2,.72,.17,1),opacity .42s ease!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-card.color-reveal.stamp-st1 img,
    #stampPreview .preview-card.stamp-awakening.stamp-st1 #previewStampImage{
      filter:grayscale(.82) sepia(.18) saturate(.58) brightness(.7) contrast(.94)!important;opacity:.83!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-card.color-reveal.stamp-st2 img,
    #stampPreview .preview-card.stamp-awakening.stamp-st2 #previewStampImage{
      filter:grayscale(.35) sepia(.1) saturate(.8) brightness(.88) contrast(.98)!important;opacity:.95!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-card.color-reveal.stamp-st3 img,
    #stampPreview .preview-card.stamp-awakening.stamp-st3 #previewStampImage{
      filter:grayscale(0) sepia(.02) saturate(.98) brightness(1) contrast(1)!important;opacity:1!important;
    }
    .album-wall .stamp-card.color-reveal:before,
    #stampPreview .preview-card.stamp-awakening .preview-image:after{
      content:""!important;display:block!important;position:absolute!important;z-index:8!important;
      left:-18%!important;right:auto!important;top:0!important;bottom:0!important;width:8%!important;height:auto!important;
      border-radius:0!important;transform:skewX(-5deg)!important;
      background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,rgba(255,225,166,.22),#f2c97d,rgba(255,225,166,.2),transparent)!important;
      box-shadow:0 0 22px rgba(243,194,107,.88),0 0 54px rgba(230,167,72,.42)!important;
      animation:stampScan 1.55s cubic-bezier(.2,.72,.17,1) both!important;pointer-events:none!important;
    }
    @keyframes stampScan{0%{left:-18%;opacity:0}12%{opacity:1}86%{opacity:1}100%{left:112%;opacity:0}}
    #stampPreview .preview-image{position:relative;overflow:hidden}

    /* SCENES — the approved single luminous wave, with staggered breathing cards. */
    .scenes-page{
      height:calc(100svh - 118px)!important;min-height:650px!important;max-height:920px!important;
      grid-template-rows:auto auto minmax(330px,1fr) 68px!important;gap:8px!important;
      overflow:hidden!important;padding:clamp(20px,2.45vw,36px)!important;
      background:linear-gradient(120deg,rgba(8,7,6,.45),rgba(30,24,18,.08) 53%,rgba(8,7,6,.4))!important;
      backdrop-filter:blur(1.5px) saturate(.84)!important;
    }
    body[data-view="scenes"] .scenes-page{display:grid!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-header{
      display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(420px,.82fr) minmax(590px,1.18fr)!important;
      gap:18px!important;align-items:start!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-heading{max-width:610px!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-heading .page-title{
      font-size:clamp(43px,3.9vw,62px)!important;line-height:.96!important;font-weight:300!important;
      letter-spacing:-.052em!important;white-space:nowrap!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-header-tools{
      position:relative!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:174px minmax(402px,1fr) 60px!important;
      grid-template-rows:62px!important;gap:9px!important;width:100%!important;min-width:0!important;
      align-items:stretch!important;justify-self:end!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .world-clocks{
      grid-column:1!important;grid-row:1!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:1fr 1px 1fr!important;
      min-width:0!important;min-height:62px!important;margin:0!important;padding:8px 12px!important;
      border:1px solid rgba(223,188,119,.28)!important;border-radius:24px!important;
      background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(11,10,8,.36),rgba(255,255,255,.035))!important;
      backdrop-filter:blur(17px)!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .world-clocks div{text-align:center!important}.scenes-page .world-clocks b{font:200 21px var(--serif)!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-visual-panel{
      position:static!important;grid-column:2!important;grid-row:1!important;display:grid!important;
      grid-template-columns:38px 94px minmax(98px,1fr) 116px!important;grid-template-rows:1fr!important;
      align-items:center!important;gap:8px!important;width:auto!important;height:62px!important;padding:7px 9px!important;
      border:1px solid rgba(223,188,119,.28)!important;border-radius:24px!important;
      background:linear-gradient(105deg,rgba(12,11,9,.33),rgba(38,29,20,.22))!important;
      box-shadow:none!important;backdrop-filter:blur(17px)!important;opacity:1!important;pointer-events:auto!important;transform:none!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-preview-dot{width:36px!important;height:36px!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-quality{min-width:0!important}.scenes-page .scene-quality button{padding:6px 7px!important;white-space:nowrap!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-visual-panel label{grid-column:3!important;grid-row:1!important;grid-template-columns:auto minmax(58px,1fr)!important;min-width:0!important}
    .scenes-page .custom-wallpaper{
      grid-column:4!important;grid-row:1!important;width:100%!important;height:38px!important;margin:0!important;
      padding:0 8px!important;white-space:nowrap!important;overflow:hidden!important;text-overflow:ellipsis!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-visual-button{
      grid-column:3!important;grid-row:1!important;width:60px!important;height:62px!important;margin:0!important;padding:0 5px!important;
      border:1px solid rgba(223,188,119,.34)!important;border-radius:50%!important;
      background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(222,185,113,.09),rgba(11,10,8,.32))!important;
      display:flex!important;flex-direction:column!important;justify-content:center!important;gap:7px!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-basis{margin:4px 0 2px!important;padding-left:2px!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-gallery{
      position:relative!important;height:auto!important;min-height:0!important;margin:0!important;padding:0!important;
      overflow:hidden!important;border:0!important;border-radius:28px!important;
      background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(8,7,6,.02),rgba(8,7,6,.18))!important;
      backdrop-filter:none!important;isolation:isolate!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-gallery:before,.scenes-page .scene-gallery:after{display:none!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-curve{
      position:absolute!important;z-index:2!important;inset:0!important;width:100%!important;height:100%!important;
      min-width:0!important;opacity:1!important;overflow:visible!important;pointer-events:none!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path{fill:none!important;stroke-linecap:round!important;vector-effect:non-scaling-stroke!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path:first-child{
      stroke:rgba(238,204,137,.13)!important;stroke-width:10!important;filter:blur(5px)!important;
      animation:sceneWaveGlow 5.8s ease-in-out infinite!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path:last-child{
      stroke:url(#sceneLine)!important;stroke-width:1.65!important;stroke-dasharray:160 18 32 12!important;
      filter:drop-shadow(0 0 5px rgba(235,197,123,.8)) drop-shadow(0 0 14px rgba(221,171,84,.36))!important;
      animation:sceneWaveTravel 8s linear infinite,sceneWaveGlow 5.8s ease-in-out infinite!important;
    }
    @keyframes sceneWaveTravel{to{stroke-dashoffset:-222}}
    @keyframes sceneWaveGlow{50%{opacity:.58;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 10px rgba(238,200,128,.5))}}
    .scenes-page .scene-track{
      position:absolute!important;z-index:4!important;inset:0!important;display:block!important;min-width:0!important;
      padding:0!important;overflow:visible!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-card{
      --card-w:146px;--card-rot:0deg;
      position:absolute!important;right:auto!important;bottom:auto!important;flex:none!important;width:var(--card-w)!important;
      margin:0!important;padding:6px 6px 11px!important;border:1px solid rgba(231,207,164,.18)!important;
      border-radius:18px!important;background:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(14,12,10,.42),rgba(255,255,255,.038))!important;
      color:#f1e8da!important;text-align:left!important;opacity:.6!important;filter:saturate(.72) brightness(.8)!important;
      transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(var(--card-rot))!important;transform-origin:center bottom!important;
      box-shadow:0 18px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.28)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(5px)!important;
      animation:sceneCardBreath calc(5.6s + var(--i)*.27s) ease-in-out infinite!important;
      animation-delay:calc(var(--i)*-.73s)!important;
      transition:opacity .65s,filter .65s,transform .7s var(--ease),box-shadow .7s,border-color .7s!important;
    }
    @keyframes sceneCardBreath{50%{box-shadow:0 23px 47px rgba(0,0,0,.36),0 0 22px rgba(224,183,104,.075)}}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(1){--card-w:144px;--card-rot:-2.8deg;left:7.5%!important;top:56%!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(2){--card-w:132px;--card-rot:2deg;left:22.5%!important;top:48%!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(3){--card-w:166px;--card-rot:-1.2deg;left:38.5%!important;top:40%!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(4){--card-w:142px;--card-rot:1.6deg;left:54.5%!important;top:52%!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(5){--card-w:132px;--card-rot:-1.5deg;left:68.5%!important;top:46%!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(6){--card-w:136px;--card-rot:1.8deg;left:81.5%!important;top:53%!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:nth-child(7){--card-w:126px;--card-rot:-1.7deg;left:93%!important;top:45%!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:before{
      content:""!important;position:absolute!important;left:50%!important;top:auto!important;bottom:-15px!important;
      width:7px!important;height:7px!important;border-radius:50%!important;transform:translateX(-50%)!important;
      background:#d9b66f!important;box-shadow:0 0 0 7px rgba(221,181,104,.09),0 0 18px rgba(235,195,119,.28)!important;
      animation:sceneNodeBreath calc(2.8s + var(--i)*.19s) ease-in-out infinite!important;
    }
    @keyframes sceneNodeBreath{50%{background:#f0cf8b;box-shadow:0 0 0 15px rgba(225,183,105,0),0 0 27px rgba(236,196,116,.58)}}
    .scenes-page .scene-card img{width:100%!important;height:132px!important;border-radius:13px!important;filter:brightness(.62) saturate(.72)!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card small{margin:8px 3px 2px!important;color:#aaa093!important;font-size:6.5px!important}.scenes-page .scene-card b{font:italic 300 18px var(--serif)!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card:hover{z-index:8!important;opacity:.82!important;filter:saturate(.9) brightness(.92)!important;transform:translate(-50%,-54%) rotate(0) scale(1.05)!important}
    .scenes-page .scene-card.on{
      z-index:10!important;opacity:1!important;filter:none!important;border-color:rgba(239,203,133,.86)!important;
      background:linear-gradient(150deg,rgba(22,18,13,.57),rgba(255,255,255,.055))!important;
      transform:translate(-50%,-70%) rotate(0) scale(1.14)!important;
      box-shadow:0 31px 76px rgba(0,0,0,.5),0 0 0 4px rgba(231,190,111,.08),0 0 32px rgba(224,173,83,.14)!important;
    }
    body[data-view="scenes"] .scenes-page .scene-card.on{
      transform:translate(-50%,-70%) rotate(0) scale(1.14)!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-card.on img{filter:brightness(.95) saturate(.95)!important}.scenes-page .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{display:none!important}

    .scene-journey-footer{
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(330px,1fr) 66px minmax(410px,1.25fr);align-items:center;gap:18px;
      min-height:68px;margin-top:0;padding:7px 13px;border:1px solid rgba(220,185,116,.21);border-radius:28px;
      background:linear-gradient(100deg,rgba(10,9,7,.36),rgba(41,31,21,.18),rgba(10,9,7,.35));backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
    }
    .scene-footer-progress,.scene-footer-next{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;min-width:0}.scene-footer-progress>i{font:italic 24px var(--serif);color:#d4b573}
    .scene-footer-copy{display:grid;gap:2px;white-space:nowrap}.scene-footer-copy small{color:#9d9384;font-size:6px;letter-spacing:.16em}.scene-footer-copy b{color:#d9c6a3;font:300 12px var(--serif)}
    .scene-progress-dots{display:flex;flex:1;align-items:center;gap:0}.scene-progress-dots i{position:relative;flex:1;height:1px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}.scene-progress-dots i:after{content:"";position:absolute;right:-2px;top:-2px;width:5px;height:5px;border-radius:50%;background:#675f54}.scene-progress-dots i.done{background:linear-gradient(90deg,#8da594,#e3bd72)}.scene-progress-dots i.done:after{background:#e3bd72;box-shadow:0 0 10px rgba(232,191,111,.52)}
    .scene-footer-compass{display:grid;place-items:center;width:58px;height:58px;border:1px solid rgba(224,190,122,.5);border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(224,187,112,.09),transparent 68%);color:#dec087;font:300 26px var(--serif);animation:compassBreathe 4.8s ease-in-out infinite}@keyframes compassBreathe{50%{box-shadow:0 0 24px rgba(226,181,96,.16);transform:rotate(8deg)}}
    .scene-footer-next{justify-content:flex-end}.scene-footer-next img{width:48px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;object-fit:cover;filter:brightness(.75)}.scene-mini-windows{display:flex;gap:5px;margin-left:8px}.scene-mini-windows i{width:14px;height:22px;border:1px solid rgba(218,184,115,.28);border-radius:8px 8px 2px 2px;background:rgba(7,7,6,.32)}.scene-mini-windows i.lit{background:radial-gradient(ellipse,#f1c06a 8%,rgba(223,146,54,.38) 46%,rgba(7,7,6,.2) 72%);box-shadow:0 0 12px rgba(233,173,73,.22)}

    @media(max-width:1180px){
      body[data-view="album"] .album-head{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}body[data-view="album"] .album-head .page-title{white-space:normal!important}
      .scenes-page .scene-header{grid-template-columns:1fr!important}.scenes-page .scene-header-tools{justify-self:start!important;width:100%!important}
      .scenes-page .scene-gallery{overflow-x:auto!important}.scenes-page .scene-track,.scenes-page .scene-curve{min-width:1080px!important;width:1080px!important}
      .scene-journey-footer{grid-template-columns:1fr 56px 1fr}
    }
    @media(max-width:760px){
      .album-wall{--wall-height:7800px}.album-wall .stamp-slot{width:var(--wall-w-mobile)!important;height:var(--wall-h-mobile)!important}
      .scenes-page .scene-header-tools{grid-template-columns:1fr 58px!important;grid-template-rows:64px auto!important}.scenes-page .world-clocks{grid-column:1!important}.scenes-page .scene-visual-button{grid-column:2!important;width:58px!important;height:58px!important}.scenes-page .scene-visual-panel{grid-column:1/3!important;grid-row:2!important;height:auto!important;min-height:62px!important;grid-template-columns:35px 1fr!important}.scenes-page .scene-visual-panel label,.scenes-page .custom-wallpaper{grid-column:1/3!important}
      .scene-journey-footer{grid-template-columns:1fr 48px}.scene-footer-next{grid-column:1/3}.scene-footer-compass{width:46px;height:46px}.scene-mini-windows{margin-left:auto}
    }

    /* V14 · interaction and scene refinement */
    .stage{isolation:isolate}
    .stage-center{z-index:12;pointer-events:auto}
    .caption-mask{
      left:50%!important;bottom:0!important;width:100%;height:24%;
      transform:translateX(-50%)!important;resize:none!important;
      min-width:30%;min-height:8%;max-width:100%;max-height:60%;
      border:0!important;border-radius:0!important;
      background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(13,14,14,.84),rgba(7,8,8,.98))!important;
      backdrop-filter:blur(18px) saturate(.72)!important;
      box-shadow:0 -10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.28),inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.045)!important;
    }
    .caption-mask:before,.caption-mask span{display:none!important}
    .mask-panel{transition:opacity .22s ease,transform .22s ease}
    .mask-panel.open{display:block;opacity:1;transform:none}
    .segment-pick-actions{
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr minmax(190px,1.25fr) 1fr;gap:8px;
      margin:8px 0 4px;
    }
    .segment-pick-actions button{
      display:grid;grid-template-columns:30px 1fr;grid-template-rows:auto auto;align-items:center;
      min-height:48px;padding:7px 12px;border:1px solid #c9bdab;border-radius:16px;
      color:#5f574d;background:rgba(255,255,255,.25);text-align:left;
    }
    .segment-pick-actions button i{
      grid-row:1/3;display:grid;place-items:center;width:25px;height:25px;border-radius:50%;
      color:#f5eee2;background:#626f5e;font:normal 10px var(--sans);
    }
    .segment-pick-actions button span{font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.13em}
    .segment-pick-actions button small{margin-top:2px;color:#8a8176;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.08em}
    .segment-pick-actions .segment-play-action{border-color:#a89a83;background:#302c27;color:#f4ecdf}
    .segment-pick-actions .segment-play-action i{background:#d5b779;color:#2c2823}
    .segment-pick-actions .segment-play-action small{color:#bdb2a4}
    .segment-pick-actions .segment-play-action.on{background:#566954;border-color:#566954;box-shadow:0 8px 22px rgba(65,79,61,.2)}
    input[type="range"]:focus,input[type="range"]:focus-visible,
    .scene-visual-panel input[type="range"]:focus,.scene-visual-panel input[type="range"]:focus-visible{
      outline:none!important;box-shadow:none!important;
    }
    .backdrop{
      filter:blur(var(--wall-blur)) saturate(var(--wall-saturate,1)) contrast(var(--wall-contrast,1)) brightness(var(--wall-brightness,1))!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path:first-child{
      stroke-width:2.15!important;stroke:rgba(222,184,112,.16)!important;
      animation:sceneWaveGlow 5.8s ease-in-out infinite!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-curve path:last-child{
      stroke-width:1.35!important;stroke-dasharray:88 20 18 13 46 24!important;
      animation:sceneWaveTravel 8s linear infinite,sceneWaveGlow 5.8s ease-in-out infinite!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .scene-curve .scene-breath-path{
      fill:none;stroke:url(#sceneLine);stroke-width:2.35;stroke-linecap:round;
      stroke-dasharray:6 48 68 46;opacity:.48;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 7px rgba(236,196,116,.3));
      animation:sceneWaveTravel 11s linear infinite reverse,sceneWaveGlow 4.9s ease-in-out infinite;
    }
    .scenes-page .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{
      display:block!important;position:absolute!important;z-index:16!important;
      width:76px!important;height:76px!important;margin:0!important;padding:0!important;
      transform:translate(-50%,-50%)!important;background:rgba(8,8,7,.2)!important;
      border:0!important;border-radius:50%!important;box-shadow:none!important;
      filter:drop-shadow(0 9px 16px rgba(0,0,0,.42))!important;
      transition:left .72s var(--ease),top .72s var(--ease),filter .25s ease!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .pocket-watch.watch-orbit:hover,.scenes-page .pocket-watch.watch-orbit.touched{
      transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1.05)!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .watch-orbit .watch-loop,.scenes-page .watch-orbit .watch-crown{display:none!important}
    .scenes-page .watch-orbit .watch-face{
      inset:3px!important;border:1px solid rgba(232,203,146,.72)!important;
      box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 3px rgba(255,255,255,.025),0 0 0 1px rgba(220,183,113,.32)!important;
      background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(218,180,109,.08) 0 3%,transparent 4% 42%,rgba(218,180,109,.05) 43% 46%,transparent 47%)!important;
    }
    .scenes-page .watch-orbit .roman-mark{font-size:5px!important}
    .scenes-page .watch-orbit .watch-digital{bottom:14px!important;font-size:5px!important}

    /* V14 · stamp collection rebuilt as a readable wall + study desk */
    .album-collection-bar{grid-template-columns:52px minmax(160px,1fr) auto!important}
    .collection-bar-title{padding-left:18px;color:#d9bf8a;font-size:9px;letter-spacing:.22em}
    .album-head{align-items:end!important}.album-tools{justify-content:flex-end!important}
    .album-wall{
      height:min(66vh,760px)!important;min-height:620px!important;max-height:760px!important;
      overflow-x:hidden!important;overflow-y:auto!important;overscroll-behavior:contain;
      scroll-snap-type:y proximity;border:1px solid rgba(218,184,113,.18)!important;
      border-radius:30px!important;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(8,8,7,.88),rgba(38,31,24,.46)),var(--wall-paper)!important;
      box-shadow:inset 0 1px rgba(255,255,255,.035),0 26px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.28)!important;
    }
    .album-wall::-webkit-scrollbar,.stamp-study-detail::-webkit-scrollbar{width:7px}.album-wall::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb,.stamp-study-detail::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{border-radius:10px;background:rgba(220,184,112,.38)}
    .album-wall .stamp-slot{max-width:178px!important;max-height:198px!important;scroll-snap-align:center}
    .album-wall .stamp-card{border:0!important;background:transparent!important;box-shadow:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card:before,.album-wall .stamp-card:after{display:none!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card img{filter:grayscale(1) sepia(.16) brightness(.7)!important}
    .album-wall .stamp-card:not(.locked):hover img,.album-wall .stamp-card.color-reveal img{filter:none!important}
    #stampPreview{padding:3vh 2vw!important;background:rgba(4,4,4,.88)!important;backdrop-filter:blur(13px)!important}
    #stampPreview .stamp-study-card{
      display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(470px,1.03fr) minmax(460px,.97fr)!important;
      width:min(96vw,1500px)!important;height:min(92vh,900px)!important;max-width:none!important;max-height:none!important;
      padding:0!important;overflow:hidden!important;border:1px solid rgba(218,178,104,.44)!important;border-radius:28px!important;
      background:#16130f!important;box-shadow:0 45px 120px rgba(0,0,0,.72)!important;
    }
    .stamp-study-collection{position:relative;min-width:0;padding:28px 28px 24px;overflow:hidden;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(10,9,7,.18),rgba(7,7,6,.68)),var(--scene-image);background-size:cover;background-position:center}
    .stamp-study-collection:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;background:radial-gradient(circle at 52% 42%,transparent 12%,rgba(7,6,5,.14) 58%,rgba(4,4,3,.66) 100%)}
    .stamp-study-collection>header{position:relative;z-index:4;display:flex;align-items:start;justify-content:space-between;gap:18px;color:#f2e7d5}
    .stamp-study-collection h3{margin:7px 0 0;font:300 clamp(28px,3vw,44px) var(--serif)}.stamp-study-collection>header small{margin-top:9px;color:#aa9b85;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.12em}
    .stamp-study-wall{position:absolute;z-index:3;inset:100px 16px 20px}
    .stamp-study-thumb{--x:50%;--y:50%;--w:100px;--r:0deg;position:absolute;left:var(--x);top:var(--y);width:var(--w);padding:0;border:0;background:none;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(var(--r));transition:transform .48s var(--ease),filter .4s,opacity .4s;filter:brightness(.62) saturate(.65);opacity:.72}
    .stamp-study-thumb img{display:block;width:100%;max-height:170px;object-fit:contain;filter:drop-shadow(0 15px 15px rgba(0,0,0,.48));transition:filter .45s}
    .stamp-study-thumb:hover{z-index:8;opacity:1;filter:none;transform:translate(-50%,-55%) rotate(0) scale(1.08)}
    .stamp-study-thumb.on{z-index:9;opacity:1;filter:none;transform:translate(-50%,-50%) rotate(0) scale(1.14)}
    .stamp-study-thumb.on img{filter:drop-shadow(0 18px 22px rgba(0,0,0,.62)) drop-shadow(0 0 12px rgba(229,190,115,.36))}
    .stamp-study-thumb.locked{pointer-events:none;opacity:.23;filter:grayscale(1) brightness(.45)}
    .stamp-study-detail{position:relative;min-width:0;padding:30px 30px 28px;overflow:auto;background:linear-gradient(145deg,#241e18,#15120f 62%,#0f0d0b);color:#e9decd}
    .stamp-study-detail>.modal-close{position:absolute!important;z-index:6;right:19px!important;top:18px!important}
    .stamp-study-hero{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(150px,34%) 1fr;align-items:start;gap:25px;padding:18px 32px 19px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(218,183,112,.18)}
    .stamp-study-hero .preview-image{display:grid;place-items:center;min-height:185px;padding:14px;border:1px solid rgba(218,183,112,.16);border-radius:18px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.18)}
    .stamp-study-hero .preview-image img{width:100%!important;height:190px!important;max-height:190px!important;object-fit:contain!important;filter:drop-shadow(0 18px 17px rgba(0,0,0,.52))!important}
    .stamp-study-hero h3{margin:9px 0 14px;font:300 clamp(25px,2.5vw,43px) var(--serif);line-height:1.02}.stamp-study-hero .preview-meta{display:flex!important;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px!important}
    .stamp-narration{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;align-items:center;gap:18px;margin:20px 0 14px;padding:15px 16px;border:1px solid rgba(218,183,112,.17);border-radius:15px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.025)}
    .stamp-narration p{margin:0;color:#c7bba9;font-size:12px;line-height:1.75}.stamp-narration button,.culture-narration{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:142px;padding:10px 12px;border:1px solid rgba(224,188,119,.4);border-radius:99px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.18);color:#ddc492;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.09em}
    .stamp-narration button i,.culture-narration i{display:grid;place-items:center;width:24px;height:24px;border-radius:50%;background:#d6b777;color:#221d17;font-style:normal}
    .stamp-learning-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:12px}.stamp-learning-actions button{flex:1}
    #stampPreview .stamp-words{display:block!important;max-height:none!important;opacity:1!important;overflow:visible!important}
    #stampPreview .word-row{grid-template-columns:minmax(170px,1.1fr) minmax(140px,1fr) 34px 32px!important;gap:8px!important;padding:8px 4px!important}.word-row .listen-count{color:#9e8f78;font-size:7px;white-space:nowrap}.stamp-words.show-hints .word-hint{display:block!important}

    /* V14 · six culture shelves and listening statistics */
    .culture-head{align-items:end}.culture-cats{position:sticky;z-index:12;top:76px;display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;padding:10px 0 16px;background:linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(17,18,16,.94),rgba(17,18,16,.76),transparent);backdrop-filter:blur(10px)}
    .culture-cats button{min-width:112px}.culture-path{display:block!important;min-width:0!important;overflow:visible!important}
    .culture-group{margin:7px 0 38px}.culture-group>header{display:flex;align-items:end;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:13px;padding-bottom:10px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(220,192,139,.17)}
    .culture-group>header h3{margin:0;color:#eee3d2;font:300 29px var(--serif)}.culture-group>header span{color:#9a8e7c;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.13em}
    .culture-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,minmax(0,1fr));gap:15px}
    .culture-card{position:relative!important;width:auto!important;height:310px!important;min-width:0!important;left:auto!important;top:auto!important;display:grid!important;grid-template-rows:1fr auto!important;padding:0!important;overflow:hidden!important;border:1px solid rgba(226,204,167,.17)!important;border-radius:23px!important;background:#211d18!important;transform:none!important;opacity:1!important;filter:none!important;text-align:left!important;box-shadow:0 18px 38px rgba(0,0,0,.22)!important}
    .culture-card img{width:100%!important;height:100%!important;min-height:0!important;object-fit:cover!important;filter:saturate(.72) contrast(1.04) brightness(.7)!important;transition:filter .55s,transform .7s var(--ease)!important}
    .culture-card>div{padding:14px 16px 17px!important;background:linear-gradient(180deg,#29241e,#1c1915)!important}.culture-card small{display:block;margin-bottom:6px;color:#b49a6d;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.11em}.culture-card b{display:block;color:#efe5d6;font:300 21px var(--serif);line-height:1.08}
    .culture-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px)!important;border-color:rgba(231,194,124,.44)!important}.culture-card:hover img{filter:saturate(.92) contrast(1.02) brightness(.85)!important;transform:scale(1.035)}
    .culture-story-card{display:grid!important;grid-template-columns:minmax(330px,.88fr) minmax(430px,1.12fr)!important;width:min(92vw,1150px)!important;max-width:none!important;max-height:88vh!important;padding:0!important;overflow:hidden!important;background:#181511!important}
    .culture-story-card>.modal-close{position:absolute!important;z-index:5;right:18px!important;top:17px!important}.culture-dialog-image{position:relative;min-height:660px;background:#0b0a08}.culture-dialog-image img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;filter:saturate(.72) brightness(.65)}.culture-dialog-image:after{content:"";position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(180deg,transparent 55%,rgba(9,8,7,.82))}.culture-dialog-image .micro{position:absolute;z-index:2;left:24px;bottom:25px;color:#dfbd7b}
    .culture-dialog-copy{padding:48px 42px 34px;overflow:auto}.culture-dialog-copy h2{margin:0 0 20px;color:#f0e6d7;font:300 clamp(34px,4vw,56px) var(--serif);line-height:1.02}.culture-dialog-copy .bubble{margin:0 0 14px;padding:0;border:0;background:none;color:#cfc3b1;font-size:14px;line-height:1.78}.culture-narration{margin:0 0 22px}
    .culture-word-list{display:grid;gap:7px;margin:15px 0 22px}.culture-word-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:minmax(130px,.8fr) minmax(150px,1.2fr) 34px 48px;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:9px 10px;border-top:1px solid rgba(220,188,125,.14);color:#cfc2af}.culture-word-row b{color:#eee2d0;font:300 16px var(--serif)}.culture-word-row small{font-size:8px}.culture-word-row button{width:30px;height:30px;border:1px solid rgba(225,190,121,.35);border-radius:50%;color:#dcbf87;background:rgba(0,0,0,.18)}.culture-word-row em{color:#9c8e78;font:normal 8px var(--sans);text-align:right}
    .lexicon-page{padding-bottom:70px}.lexicon-head{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:25px;align-items:end}.lexicon-total{display:grid;place-items:center;width:170px;height:150px;border:1px solid rgba(222,188,121,.32);border-radius:50%;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(222,184,111,.11),transparent 66%)}.lexicon-total strong{color:#eed69e;font:300 54px var(--serif)}.lexicon-total span{margin-top:-22px;color:#9b8e7b;font-size:7px;letter-spacing:.13em}.lexicon-summary{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:12px;margin:28px 0}.lexicon-summary article{padding:20px;border:1px solid rgba(220,188,125,.17);border-radius:20px;background:rgba(9,9,8,.22)}.lexicon-summary strong{display:block;color:#e8cf9c;font:300 35px var(--serif)}.lexicon-summary span{color:#a99a85;font-size:8px;letter-spacing:.11em}.lexicon-board{padding:22px;border:1px solid rgba(220,188,125,.19);border-radius:25px;background:rgba(8,8,7,.25)}.lexicon-board>header{display:flex;align-items:end;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px}.lexicon-board>header span{color:#ede0cb;font:300 25px var(--serif)}.lexicon-board>header small{color:#968a79;font-size:8px}.lexicon-list{display:grid;gap:6px}.lexicon-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:42px minmax(180px,1fr) 1.3fr 110px;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 12px;border-top:1px solid rgba(222,190,127,.12)}.lexicon-row>i{color:#b79a65;font:italic 16px var(--serif)}.lexicon-row b{color:#e9ddca;font:300 18px var(--serif)}.lexicon-row span{color:#a99d8b;font-size:9px}.lexicon-row em{color:#dbc08c;font:normal 10px var(--sans);text-align:right}
    @media(max-width:760px){
      .segment-pick-actions{grid-template-columns:1fr}.segment-pick-actions button{min-height:43px}
      .scenes-page .pocket-watch.watch-orbit{width:64px!important;height:64px!important}
    }
    @media(max-width:1050px){
      #stampPreview .stamp-study-card,.culture-story-card{grid-template-columns:1fr!important;height:94vh!important;overflow:auto!important}.stamp-study-collection{min-height:570px}.stamp-study-detail{overflow:visible}.culture-dialog-image{min-height:390px}.culture-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,minmax(0,1fr))}
    }
    @media(max-width:720px){
      .album-wall{min-height:540px!important}.culture-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,minmax(0,1fr))}.culture-card{height:280px!important}.culture-cats button{min-width:0;flex:1 1 90px}.lexicon-head{grid-template-columns:1fr}.lexicon-total{width:120px;height:100px}.lexicon-summary{grid-template-columns:1fr}.lexicon-row{grid-template-columns:32px 1fr 70px}.lexicon-row span{display:none}.culture-word-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 30px 44px}.culture-word-row small{grid-column:1}.stamp-narration{grid-template-columns:1fr}.stamp-study-hero{grid-template-columns:120px 1fr}
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body data-view="home">
  <div class="backdrop on" id="backdropA"></div>
  <div class="backdrop" id="backdropB"></div>

  <main class="app">
    <header class="topbar">
      <div class="brand-area">
        <button class="home-button" id="homeBtn" type="button" aria-label="Home">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M4 10.5 12 4l8 6.5v8.2a1.3 1.3 0 0 1-1.3 1.3H5.3A1.3 1.3 0 0 1 4 18.7Z"/><path d="M9.2 20v-6h5.6v6"/></svg>
        </button>
        <button class="library-button" id="libraryBtn" type="button"><span data-i18n="library"></span></button>
      </div>
      <nav class="main-nav" aria-label="Main navigation">
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="player" type="button"><span data-i18n="navPlayer"></span></button>
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="progress" type="button"><span data-i18n="navProgress"></span></button>
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="time" type="button"><span data-i18n="navTime"></span></button>
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="scenes" type="button"><span data-i18n="navScenes"></span></button>
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="album" type="button"><span data-i18n="navAlbum"></span></button>
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="journey" type="button"><span data-i18n="navMap"></span></button>
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="culture" type="button"><span data-i18n="navCulture"></span></button>
        <button class="nav-button" data-view="lexicon" type="button"><span data-i18n="navLexicon"></span></button>
      </nav>
      <div class="top-actions">
        <div class="language-switch" id="languageSwitch" aria-label="Language">
          <button type="button" data-lang="it">IT</button>
          <button type="button" data-lang="en">EN</button>
          <button type="button" data-lang="bi">IT+EN</button>
        </div>
        <button class="add-button" id="addBtn" type="button" aria-label="Import media">＋</button>
      </div>
    </header>
    <input id="fileInput" type="file" accept="audio/*,video/*" hidden>

    <section class="view home-view open" id="homeView">
      <div class="home-content">
        <div class="home-greeting" aria-live="polite"><span id="homeGreeting"></span><small id="homeGreetingTime"></small></div>
        <div class="ripple-ritual" aria-label="Import audio or video">
          <div class="ripple-motto" data-i18n="homeMotto"></div>
          <div class="ripple-field" aria-hidden="true"><i></i><i></i><i></i><i></i><i></i></div>
          <button class="ripple-import" id="importBtn" type="button" aria-label="Import audio or video"><span>＋</span></button>
          <span class="ripple-caption" data-i18n="importMedia"></span>
        </div>
        <div class="home-scene-note"><i></i><span id="homeSceneName"></span></div>
      </div>
      <span class="film-credit" data-i18n="filmCredit"></span>
    </section>

    <section class="view glass-page player-page" id="playerView">
      <header class="media-head">
        <div>
          <span class="micro" id="mediaKind">AUDIO</span>
          <div class="media-title-row">
            <h1 class="media-title" id="mediaTitle"></h1>
            <button class="rename-mini" id="renameCurrentBtn" type="button" aria-label="Rename">✎</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <span class="media-duration" id="mediaDuration">00:00</span>
      </header>
      <div class="player-shell">
        <div class="player-main">
          <div class="stage" id="stage">
            <div class="audio-cover" id="audioCover">
              <div class="audio-phone">
                <div class="vinyl-stage">
                  <div class="lace-ribbon one"></div><div class="lace-ribbon two"></div>
                  <div class="vinyl-disc"><span class="vinyl-art"></span><i></i><b>GL</b></div>
                  <div class="tone-arm"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="vinyl-copy"><span data-i18n="audioListening"></span><strong id="audioNowTitle"></strong></div>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="caption-mask" id="captionMask" aria-hidden="true"></div>
            <div class="stage-tools">
              <button class="tool" id="maskBtn" type="button"><span data-i18n="mask"></span></button>
              <button class="tool" id="theaterBtn" type="button"><span data-i18n="theater"></span></button>
            </div>
            <div class="mask-panel" id="maskPanel">
              <label><span data-i18n="width"></span><input id="maskWidth" type="range" min="30" max="100" value="100"></label>
              <label><span data-i18n="height"></span><input id="maskHeight" type="range" min="8" max="55" value="24"></label>
              <label><span data-i18n="level"></span><input id="maskLevel" type="range" min="0" max="70" value="0"></label>
            </div>
            <button class="stage-center" id="centerBtn" type="button" aria-label="Play">▶</button>
          </div>
          <section class="timeline-block">
            <div class="timeline-time"><span id="currentTime">00:00</span><span id="totalTime">00:00</span></div>
            <div class="timeline">
              <i class="timeline-base"></i><i class="timeline-selection" id="selection"></i>
              <input id="seek" type="range" min="0" max="1" step=".01" value="0" aria-label="Timeline">
              <span class="gelato-cursor" id="gelatoCursor"><i></i><b></b></span>
            </div>
            <div class="trim-range">
              <input id="startRange" type="range" min="0" max="1" step=".1" value="0" aria-label="Clip start">
              <input id="endRange" type="range" min="0" max="1" step=".1" value="1" aria-label="Clip end">
            </div>
            <div class="segment-row">
              <div class="segment-side"><label>A <input class="time-entry" id="clipAInput" value="00:00.0" inputmode="decimal"></label><span id="aTime" hidden>00:00.0</span><button class="nudge" data-nudge="a-" type="button">−</button><button class="nudge" data-nudge="a+" type="button">＋</button></div>
              <nav class="transport" aria-label="Playback"><button id="backBtn" type="button">−3</button><button class="play" id="playBtn" type="button">▶</button><button id="forwardBtn" type="button">+3</button></nav>
              <div class="segment-side"><label>B <input class="time-entry" id="clipBInput" value="00:00.0" inputmode="decimal"></label><span id="bTime" hidden>00:00.0</span><button class="nudge" data-nudge="b-" type="button">−</button><button class="nudge" data-nudge="b+" type="button">＋</button></div>
            </div>
            <div class="segment-pick-actions" id="segmentPickActions">
              <button id="markStartBtn" type="button"><i>A</i><span data-it="IMPOSTA INIZIO" data-en="SET START"></span><small id="quickStartTime">00:00.0</small></button>
              <button class="segment-play-action" id="playSegmentBtn" type="button"><i>▶</i><span data-it="RIPRODUCI IL FRAMMENTO" data-en="PLAY SELECTION"></span><small data-it="CICLO ATTIVO" data-en="LOOP READY"></small></button>
              <button id="markEndBtn" type="button"><i>B</i><span data-it="IMPOSTA FINE" data-en="SET END"></span><small id="quickEndTime">00:00.0</small></button>
            </div>
            <span class="segment-length" id="segmentLength">0.0 SEC</span>
          </section>
          <section class="audio-workbench" id="audioWorkbench">
            <header><div><span class="micro" data-i18n="dictationKicker"></span><h3 data-i18n="dictationTitle"></h3></div><button id="toggleSourceBtn" type="button"><span data-i18n="showSource"></span></button></header>
            <div class="transcript-grid">
              <div class="source-pane" id="sourcePane"><label data-i18n="sourceText"></label><textarea id="sourceText" spellcheck="false"></textarea><div class="transcript-actions"><button id="importTranscriptBtn" type="button"><span data-i18n="importText"></span></button><input id="transcriptInput" type="file" accept=".txt,.srt,.vtt,text/plain" hidden></div></div>
              <div class="dictation-pane"><label data-i18n="yourDictation"></label><textarea id="dictationText" spellcheck="false"></textarea><button id="checkDictationBtn" type="button"><span data-i18n="checkDictation"></span></button><div class="dictation-result" id="dictationResult"></div></div>
            </div>
          </section>
        </div>
        <aside class="player-side">
          <button class="mind-clear-button" id="mindClearBtn" type="button"><i>✉</i><span><b data-i18n="clearMind"></b><small data-i18n="clearMindNote"></small></span></button>
          <section class="control-row">
            <label><small data-i18n="speed"></small><select id="speed"><option value=".5">.5×</option><option value=".75">.75×</option><option value=".85">.85×</option><option value="1" selected>1×</option><option value="1.25">1.25×</option><option value="1.5">1.5×</option><option value="2">2×</option></select></label>
            <div><small data-i18n="repeat"></small><div class="loop-buttons" id="loopButtons"><button data-loop="1" type="button">1</button><button data-loop="3" type="button">3</button><button data-loop="5" class="on" type="button">5</button><button data-loop="10" type="button">10</button><button data-loop="0" type="button">∞</button></div></div>
            <div class="loop-count"><small data-i18n="completedLoops"></small><b id="loopNow">0</b> / <span id="loopAll">5</span></div>
          </section>
          <div class="study-mode"><button class="on" id="freeMode" type="button"><span data-i18n="freeMode"></span></button><button id="learnMode" type="button"><span data-i18n="learnMode"></span></button></div>
          <section class="learning-panel" id="learningPanel">
            <div class="step-dots" id="stepDots"></div><h3 id="stepTitle"></h3><div class="learning-input" id="learningInput"></div>
            <div class="learn-actions"><button id="previousStep" type="button"><span data-i18n="back"></span></button><button class="primary" id="nextStep" type="button"></button></div>
          </section>
          <button class="save-clip" id="saveClip" type="button"><span data-i18n="saveClip"></span></button>
        </aside>
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="view glass-page progress-page page-pad" id="progressView">
      <header class="record-head">
        <div><span class="micro" data-i18n="progressKicker"></span><h2 class="page-title" data-i18n="progressTitle"></h2><p class="page-copy" data-i18n="progressCopy"></p></div>
        <div class="record-head-side"><div class="record-range-label" id="recordRangeLabel"></div><button class="record-resume" id="recordResume" type="button"><i>↗</i><span><small id="recordResumeKind"></small><b id="recordResumeTitle"></b><em id="recordResumeMeta"></em></span></button></div>
      </header>
      <div class="record-filter-bar">
        <div class="record-filter-group"><small data-i18n="mediaType"></small><div class="record-pills" id="mediaRecordFilter"><button class="on" data-media-record="all" type="button"><span data-i18n="allMedia"></span></button><button data-media-record="video" type="button"><span data-i18n="videoOnly"></span></button><button data-media-record="audio" type="button"><span data-i18n="audioOnly"></span></button></div></div>
        <div class="record-filter-group"><small data-i18n="dateRange"></small><div class="record-pills" id="rangeRecordFilter"><button data-range-record="day" type="button"><span data-i18n="daily"></span></button><button class="on" data-range-record="week" type="button"><span data-i18n="weekly"></span></button><button data-range-record="month" type="button"><span data-i18n="monthly"></span></button><button data-range-record="custom" type="button"><span data-i18n="custom"></span></button></div></div>
        <div class="custom-dates" id="customDates"><input id="recordStartDate" type="date"><i>→</i><input id="recordEndDate" type="date"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="record-layout">
        <article class="record-chart-card">
          <div class="record-chart-top"><span data-i18n="activeMinutes"></span><strong id="recordTotal">0 min</strong></div>
          <svg class="record-chart" id="recordChart" viewBox="0 0 1000 430" preserveAspectRatio="none" role="img">
            <defs><linearGradient id="recordGradient" x1="0" x2="1"><stop stop-color="#91aaa1"/><stop offset=".52" stop-color="#eed29d"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#c7796c"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="recordAreaGradient" x1="0" x2="0" y1="0" y2="1"><stop stop-color="#e4c48c" stop-opacity=".2"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#e4c48c" stop-opacity="0"/></linearGradient></defs>
            <g class="record-grid"><path d="M64 70H960M64 160H960M64 250H960M64 340H960"/></g>
            <path class="record-area" id="recordArea" d=""/>
            <path class="record-line-shadow" id="recordLineShadow" d=""/>
            <path class="record-line" id="recordLine" d=""/>
            <g id="recordDots"></g><g class="record-axis" id="recordAxis"></g>
          </svg>
          <div class="record-empty" id="recordEmpty"><span data-i18n="noRecords"></span></div>
        </article>
        <aside class="record-summary">
          <article><span data-i18n="studySessions"></span><strong id="recordSessions">0</strong><small data-i18n="studySessionsNote"></small></article>
          <article><span data-i18n="activeDays"></span><strong id="recordDays">0</strong><small data-i18n="activeDaysNote"></small></article>
          <article><span data-i18n="listeningBalance"></span><div class="balance-ring" id="balanceRing"><i></i><b id="balanceText">—</b></div><small id="balanceNote"></small></article>
        </aside>
      </div>

    <section class="view glass-page time-page page-pad" id="timeView">
      <span class="micro" data-i18n="timeKicker"></span>
      <h2 class="page-title" data-i18n="timeTitle"></h2>
      <div class="time-layout">
        <div class="time-dial">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 400 400" aria-hidden="true">
            <defs><linearGradient id="todayWave" x1="0" x2="1"><stop stop-color="#668779" stop-opacity=".2"/><stop offset=".52" stop-color="#91b39e"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#d8e0d7" stop-opacity=".25"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="sessionWave" x1="0" x2="1"><stop stop-color="#ece5d6" stop-opacity=".18"/><stop offset=".5" stop-color="#f3eee2"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#cdbb9e" stop-opacity=".25"/></linearGradient><linearGradient id="rewardWave" x1="0" x2="1"><stop stop-color="#9e4c43" stop-opacity=".2"/><stop offset=".5" stop-color="#c9796e"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#e2b2a9" stop-opacity=".25"/></linearGradient></defs>
            <circle class="dial-track" cx="200" cy="200" r="174"/>
            <circle class="dial-track" cx="200" cy="200" r="146"/>
            <circle class="dial-track" cx="200" cy="200" r="118"/>
            <circle class="dial-arc today" id="todayArc" cx="200" cy="200" r="174"/>
            <circle class="dial-arc session" id="sessionArc" cx="200" cy="200" r="146"/>
            <circle class="dial-arc reward" id="rewardArc" cx="200" cy="200" r="118"/>
          </svg>
          <i class="roman" style="--angle:0deg">XII</i><i class="roman" style="--angle:90deg">III</i><i class="roman" style="--angle:180deg">VI</i><i class="roman" style="--angle:270deg">IX</i>

          <div class="time-stat"><div><label data-i18n="session"></label><p data-i18n="sessionNote"></p></div><strong id="sessionTime">00:00</strong></div>
          <div class="time-stat"><div><label data-i18n="nextStamp"></label><p data-i18n="nextStampNote"></p></div><strong id="stampCountdown">10:00</strong></div>
          <div class="time-reward" id="timeReward"></div>
        </article>

          <button class="scene-visual-button" id="sceneVisualBtn" type="button"><span data-it="ATMOSFERA" data-en="ATMOSPHERE"></span><i></i></button>

        </div>

        <div id="timeBasisButtons"><button class="on" data-time-basis="Europe/Rome" type="button">ROMA</button><button data-time-basis="Asia/Shanghai" type="button"><span data-i18n="beijing"></span></button><button data-time-basis="Asia/Bangkok" type="button"><span data-i18n="chiangMai"></span></button><button data-time-basis="custom" type="button"><span data-i18n="custom"></span></button></div>
        <input id="customSceneTime" type="time" value="18:30">

          <defs><linearGradient id="sceneLine" x1="0" x2="1"><stop stop-color="#bda46f"/><stop offset=".46" stop-color="#f0cc83"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#ba8659"/></linearGradient></defs>
          <path d="M24 358 C116 300 190 394 282 348 C370 304 434 278 516 326 C603 377 652 405 732 354 C818 299 888 320 966 359 C1054 402 1140 302 1296 344"/>
          <path class="scene-breath-path" d="M24 358 C116 300 190 394 282 348 C370 304 434 278 516 326 C603 377 652 405 732 354 C818 299 888 320 966 359 C1054 402 1140 302 1296 344"/>
          <path id="sceneTimePath" d="M24 358 C116 300 190 394 282 348 C370 304 434 278 516 326 C603 377 652 405 732 354 C818 299 888 320 966 359 C1054 402 1140 302 1296 344"/>
        </svg>
        <button class="pocket-watch watch-orbit" id="pocketWatch" type="button" aria-label="Time settings">

          <span class="watch-face"><em class="roman-mark r12">XII</em><em class="roman-mark r3">III</em><em class="roman-mark r6">VI</em><em class="roman-mark r9">IX</em><i class="watch-hand hour" id="watchHour"></i><i class="watch-hand minute" id="watchMinute"></i><i class="watch-pin"></i><span class="watch-digital" id="sceneTime"></span></span>
        </button>
        <div class="scene-track" id="sceneTrack"></div>
      </div>
      <footer class="scene-journey-footer">

        <button class="scene-footer-compass" id="sceneNextButton" type="button" aria-label="Next scene">✦</button>

        <div class="stamp-study-wall" id="stampStudyWall"></div>

    </article>

    <button class="focus-close" id="focusClose" type="button">×</button>
    <section class="focus-write" id="focusWrite">
      <div class="focus-envelope"><i></i></div><span class="micro" data-i18n="mindRitualKicker"></span><h2 data-i18n="mindRitualTitle"></h2><p data-i18n="mindRitualCopy"></p>
      <div class="focus-timer" id="focusTimer">03:00</div><label class="focus-requirement" id="focusRequirement" for="mindText"></label><textarea id="mindText" maxlength="6000" spellcheck="false"></textarea>
      <div class="focus-actions"><button id="focusFinish" type="button"><span data-i18n="letItGo"></span></button></div>
    </section>
    <section class="focus-release" id="focusRelease"><div class="particle-field" id="particleField"></div><h2 id="releaseLine"></h2><p data-i18n="releaseCopy"></p><div class="breath-orbit"><i></i><span data-i18n="breathe"></span></div><button id="readyButton" type="button"><span data-i18n="readyQuestion"></span></button></section>

  <div class="modal" id="cultureDialog">
    <article class="dialog-card culture-story-card"><button class="modal-close" id="closeCulture" type="button">×</button><div class="culture-dialog-image"><img id="dialogImage" alt=""><span class="micro" id="dialogCity"></span></div><section class="culture-dialog-copy"><h2 id="dialogTitle"></h2><div class="bubble" id="dialogGuide"></div><button class="culture-narration" id="cultureNarrationBtn" type="button"><i>▶</i><span data-it="ASCOLTA IL RACCONTO" data-en="LISTEN TO THE STORY"></span></button><div class="culture-word-list" id="dialogWords"></div><button class="dialog-done" id="dialogDone" type="button"><span data-i18n="understood"></span></button></section></article>
  </div>
  <div class="toast" id="toast"></div>
  <script>
  (() => {
    'use strict';
    const $ = (selector, root = document) => root.querySelector(selector);
    const $$ = (selector, root = document) => Array.from(root.querySelectorAll(selector));

    const I18N = {
      it: {
        library:'LIBRERIA', navPlayer:'PLAYER', navProgress:'PROGRESSO', navTime:'TEMPO',
        navScenes:'SCENARI', navAlbum:'ALBUM', navMap:'MAPPA', navCulture:'CULTURA', navLexicon:'PAROLE',
        homeMotto:'ascolta · ripeti · ricorda', importMedia:'AUDIO O VIDEO',
        subtitlesHidden:'SOTTOTITOLI NASCOSTI', mask:'MASCHERA', theater:'CINEMA',
        width:'LARGHEZZA', height:'ALTEZZA', level:'LIVELLO', speed:'VELOCITÀ',
        repeat:'RIPETI', freeMode:'ASCOLTO LIBERO', learnMode:'IMPARA LA FRASE',
        back:'INDIETRO', saveClip:'♡  SALVA IL FRAMMENTO',
        progressKicker:'IL TUO ARCHIVIO', progressTitle:'Il ritmo del tuo studio',
        progressCopy:'Scegli prima audio o video, poi il periodo. La linea racconta i minuti che hai davvero ascoltato, giorno per giorno.',
        memoryRoute:'TRACCIA DI APPRENDIMENTO', currentPhase:'FASE ATTUALE',
        currentPhaseNote:'questa frase, adesso', repetitions:'RIPETIZIONI',
        repetitionsNote:'ritorni nel frammento', nextRitualNote:'il prossimo gesto utile',
        timeKicker:'TEMPO DI STUDIO', timeTitle:'Il tempo diventa viaggio',

    let lang = localStorage.getItem('gelato-language-v6') || 'bi';
    if (!['it','en','bi'].includes(lang)) lang = 'it';
    const textFor = (it, en) => lang === 'en' ? en : (lang === 'bi' ? it + ' / ' + en : it);
    const tr = key => lang === 'en' ? I18N.en[key] : I18N.it[key];
    function localized(el, it, en) {
      if (!el) return;
      el.replaceChildren();
      if (lang === 'bi') {
        const first = document.createElement('span');
        const second = document.createElement('span');
        first.className = 'i18n-it';
        second.className = 'i18n-en';
        first.textContent = it;
        second.textContent = en;
        el.append(first, second);
      } else {
        el.textContent = lang === 'en' ? en : it;
      }
    }
    function localizedKey(el, key) { localized(el, I18N.it[key], I18N.en[key]); }

    let currentView = 'home';
    let backdropIndex = 0;
    function setBackdrop(url, position) {
      position = position || 'center';
      const next = 1 - backdropIndex;
      const layer = next ? $('#backdropB') : $('#backdropA');
      const old = backdropIndex ? $('#backdropB') : $('#backdropA');
      layer.style.backgroundImage = 'url("' + url + '")';
      layer.style.backgroundPosition = position;
      layer.classList.add('on');
      old.classList.remove('on');
      backdropIndex = next;
    }
